sectors.name: 기술/반도체

growth_forecast.description: 반도체 시장 2026년 25% 이상 성장, 메모리 부문 30% 성장 전망

key_drivers: AI 인프라 확장으로 HBM(고대역폭메모리) 수요 급증
NVIDIA Blackwell/Rubin GPU 사이클로 AI 칩 수요 지속
risks: AI 버블 우려 및 과열된 밸류에이션 (NVIDIA P/E 43~50배)
하이퍼스케일러의 커스텀 ASIC 전환으로 NVIDIA 독점 위협
HBM 및 고급 패키징 비용 상승으로 마진 압박

scenarios.bullish: AI 인프라 투자 가속화, HBM 품귀 지속 -> 반도체 섹터 +30% 이상
scenarios.bearish: AI 수요 둔화, ASIC 전환 가속 -> NVIDIA 조정, 섹터 +10% 이하

sources.title: 2026 Market Outlook: SK hynix's HBM to Fuel AI Memory Boom
sources.original_text: According to the World Semiconductor Trade Statistics (WSTS), the global semiconductor market will grow by more than 25% year-over-year in 2026, reaching approximately $975 billion, with the memory segment increasing at 30% growth. Market research firms and investment banks anticipate particularly high growth for server and data center memory, with some estimating the 2026 memory market size to exceed $440 billion.

sources.title: The AI Memory Supercycle: How HBM Became AI's Most Critical Bottleneck
sources.original_text: Micron's high-bandwidth memory capacity sold out through calendar year 2026. Market TAM projected to reach $100B by 2028, up from $35B in 2025 (~40% CAGR). SK Hynix dominates with 62% market share; NVIDIA accounts for ~90% of their HBM supply.

sources.title: Nvidia AI Semiconductor Risk: What Breaks the Bull Case '26
sources.original_text: As of early 2026, the company's valuation has surpassed $5 trillion, underpinned by a near-monopoly in the high-performance computing accelerators that facilitate the generative artificial intelligence revolution. To break this bull case over the next 24 months, several variables must deviate from their current 'Goldilocks' path. These include a potential 'air pocket' in demand following the initial massive build-out of training infrastructure, the successful pivot of hyperscalers toward custom application-specific integrated circuits for inference workloads.

sources.title: Chip Stock Forecast 2026: Morgan Stanley Dismisses AI Bubble Hype
sources.original_text: Morgan Stanley shuts down AI bubble rumors, predicting solid growth until 2026. NVIDIA and Broadcom remain the top picks for your portfolio. Analyst Joseph Moore emphasizes that growth visibility for this sector remains crystal clear through 2027.

sectors.name: 로봇/자동화
key_drivers: 중국 로봇 투자 급증 (2025년 610건, 500억 위안 - 전년 대비 250% 증가)
CES 2026에서 상업화 전환점 확인 (Boston Dynamics, Tesla, 1X)
산업용 로봇 자동화 확대 (자동차, 반도체, 물류)
AI 기반 협동 로봇(Cobot) 중소 제조업 도입 확대
risks: 2026년은 소프트웨어의 해, 하드웨어 투자 위축 가능성
중국 로봇 기업 과잉 투자 및 통합 리스크

scenarios.bullish: 휴머노이드 로봇 상용화 가속, 공장 배치 확대 -> 섹터 +40% 이상
scenarios.bearish: 기술 성숙 지연, 자금 조달 어려움 -> 섹터 +10~15%

sources.title: The Global Humanoid Robots Market 2026-2036
sources.original_text: China's robotics sector has seen remarkable financing activity, with 610 investment deals totaling 50 billion yuan ($7 billion) in the first nine months of 2025—representing a 250% increase year-over-year. Tesla is targeting 5,000 Optimus units in 2025 with plans to scale to 100,000 by 2026. Chinese manufacturer BYD aims for 1,500 humanoids in 2025, ramping to 20,000 by 2026.

sources.title: Humanoid Robot Stocks: CES 2026 Reveals Commercial Breakout
sources.original_text: Humanoid robots shifted from demos to deployments. Boston Dynamics' Atlas enters Hyundai factories, Tesla's Optimus Gen 3 operates autonomously in production, and 1X's NEO accepts $20,000 pre-orders. Factory deployments begin now. Consumer models ship in 2026. Industry forecasts 500,000-plus humanoid units operational by the mid-2030s.

sources.title: AI-Powered Humanoid Robots Billion Dollar Market
sources.original_text: The global humanoid robot market is projected to grow from USD 2.92 billion in 2025 to USD 15.26 billion by 2030, representing a high-growth automation play for global investors.

sources.title: 2026 Robotics and AI Market Trends
sources.original_text: 2026 presents a year of opportunity. I don't foresee a huge market opportunity for robotics companies again this year, but I do for smart software/AI applications in the warehouse/airports. 2026 looks like a software year, not a hardware year. Robotics keeps consolidating.

sectors.name: 헬스케어

growth_forecast.description: GLP-1 시장 2033년 $1,708억 전망 (CAGR 13%), 제약 M&A 활발

key_drivers: 비만 치료제 경구 제형 등장 (Novo Nordisk, Eli Lilly)
제약 M&A 급증 ($2,230억, 특허 절벽 대응)
면역학, 종양학 분야 지속 성장 (Keytruda, Skyrizi)
risks: 세마글루타이드 특허 만료 2026년 이후 -> 바이오시밀러 경쟁
FDA 규제 불확실성 (정치적 개입, 백신 정책)

scenarios.bullish: GLP-1 경구 제형 FDA 승인, M&A 시너지 -> 섹터 +15% 이상
scenarios.bearish: 특허 절벽 본격화, 약가 인하 -> 섹터 0~5%

sources.title: GLP-1 Agonists Market Global Forecast to 2033
sources.original_text: The GLP-1 agonists market is expected to reach USD 170.75 billion in 2033 from USD 64.42 billion in 2025 at a CAGR of 13.0%. With the Semaglutide Patent Expiring in 2026 Onwards, the Biosimilars Market is Expected to Grow Significantly.

sources.title: Big Pharma race to snap up biotech assets as $170 billion patent cliff looms
sources.original_text: Some of the best-selling drugs in the world are facing a loss of exclusivity in key jurisdictions in the upcoming years in what the sector calls 'the patent cliff.' The need for pharma...

sources.title: Biopharma Trends 2026
sources.original_text: Near term, margins are under increasing strain at a time when the industry's performance lags that of other sectors. Biopharma's average total shareholder return was 0% from 2021 to 2025, compared with 16% for the S&P 500. Over this five-year period, only 6 of the top 20 companies outperformed the S&P 500.

sources.title: 2026 is the year of obesity pills
sources.original_text: As pharma giants Eli Lilly and Novo Nordisk continue to fight for dominance in a GLP-1 market projected to reach more than $140 billion in sales by the end of the decade, the space is expected to remain a duopoly between the two drugmakers.

sectors.name: 에너지

growth_forecast.description: 유가 하락 전망 (Brent $56/배럴), 재생에너지 정책 불확실성

risks: 재생에너지 세제 혜택 축소 (One Big Beautiful Bill Act)
석유화학 과잉 공급 (에틸렌 1,560만 톤 신규 증설)

scenarios.bullish: AI 전력 수요 급증, 공급 차질 -> 에너지 섹터 +10~15%
scenarios.bearish: 유가 $50 이하 하락, 재생에너지 정책 후퇴 -> 섹터 -10%

sources.title: Short-Term Energy Outlook - January 2026
sources.original_text: We expect oil prices will decline in 2026, as global oil production exceeds global oil demand, causing oil inventories to rise. We forecast the Brent crude oil price will average $56 per barrel (b) in 2026, 19% less than in 2025, then average $54/b in 2027. We expect global production of liquid fuels will increase by 1.4 million barrels per day (b/d) in 2026.

sources.title: Oil Market Report - January 2026
sources.original_text: Global oil demand growth is forecast to average 930 kb/d in 2026, up from 850 kb/d in 2025, reflecting a normalisation of economic conditions after last year's tariff turmoil and lower oil prices than a year ago.

sources.title: Commodities in 2026: 10 Numbers to Watch
sources.original_text: US power – 48.3 gigawatts. Power demand from data centers to reach this figure, pushing electricity grids toward reliability limits. US gas – $3.90 per million British thermal unit. The marginal supply cost for Haynesville, Texas, dry gas. Oil – 13.8 million barrels per day. US oil production growth slows to 3% year-on-year as a 2026 global oil supply glut pressures prices.

sources.title: 2026 Renewable Energy Industry Outlook
sources.original_text: 2025 has been a challenging year for renewables. The new tax law, commonly referred to as the One Big Beautiful Bill Act, rolled back many clean energy tax credits.

sectors.name: 원자재

growth_forecast.description: 구리 공급 부족 100만 톤, 금 $4,400/oz 전망

key_drivers: 데이터센터 및 전기차 배터리 수요로 산업용 금속 강세
risks: 산업용 금속 vs 귀금속 로테이션 (귀금속 상대 약세 가능)
중국 경기 둔화 시 원자재 수요 감소
달러 강세 시 원자재 가격 하락 압력

scenarios.bullish: 구리 공급 부족 심화, 금 안전자산 수요 -> 원자재 +15~20%
scenarios.bearish: 중국 경기 둔화, 달러 강세 -> 원자재 0~5%

sources.title: Commodities in 2026: 10 Numbers to Watch
sources.original_text: Metals – 1 million metric tons. The copper supply and demand balance swings by 1 million metric tons into a deficit, as data centers and electric vehicles drive demand.

sources.title: Indices 2026 outlook: Commodities
sources.original_text: Commodities are proving to be worth their weight in gold over the last five years. The Bloomberg Commodity Index (BCOM) total return has risen 11% annualized so far in the 2020s. Industrial metals may outperform precious metals in 2026 as supply deficits, infrastructure investment, and post-tariff growth support copper, aluminum, and nickel prices.

sources.title: 2026 Mining Outlook: Copper, Gold, Silver Prices Soar
sources.original_text: With prices for most metals soaring—copper at around $5.75 per pound as of today (equating to over $11,000 per ton and forecasted to average $11,400 per ton this year), gold pushing around $4,400 per ounce with potential to go much higher, and silver at about $73 per ounce with some predictions eyeing over $100 or more.

sources.title: Commodity Market Outlook: Trends Driving Optimism in 2026
sources.original_text: The outlook for broad commodities in 2026 appears increasingly optimistic. After a period of volatility and adjustment, global commodity markets may be poised to benefit from a confluence of positive trends in the new year.

summary.overall_assessment: 2026년 5개 핵심 섹터 중 기술/반도체, 로봇/자동화, 원자재 섹터가 가장 유망하며, 헬스케어와 에너지는 중립적 전망입니다.
top_opportunities: AI 인프라 확장으로 반도체/메모리 슈퍼사이클 지속 (HBM 시장 ~40% CAGR)
휴머노이드 로봇 상업화 전환점 (2026년 100만대+ 생산 목표)
구리 공급 부족 100만 톤으로 산업용 금속 강세
key_risks: AI 버블 우려 및 NVIDIA 과열된 밸류에이션 (P/E 43~50배)
